title: Fabulously Unified
description: This takes Fabously Optimized and adds things you might want running on your minecraft server and multiplayer additons as well as improved world generation and visuals to spice things up a little without changing the game.
body:
I'll make that correction immediately and remove the reference to William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld from the description. I'll also update the attribution section to ensure it strictly reflects the terrain mods you're actually using.

Here is the updated, moderation-ready description for Fabulously Unified:
Fabulously Unified

Fabulously Unified is a high-performance "Vanilla+" modpack built on the rock-solid foundation of Fabulously Optimized. It bridges the gap between extreme performance and breathtaking exploration.
🔭 The Horizon, Redefined

While many packs include Distant Horizons, they often leave you looking at the same repetitive vanilla hills. This pack is designed to give those massive render distances a true purpose. By utilizing Tectonic, we’ve created a landscape with a grander scale that is truly worth seeing from miles away.

    Tectonic: Massive mountain ranges and deep, flowing rivers that feel natural and expansive.

    Lithostitched: Ensures seamless compatibility and stability for world-gen and data-driven features.

🚀 Async Performance

Built for modern hardware, this pack utilizes C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine) and other asynchronous mods to ensure your CPU’s multiple cores are actually being used. Enjoy high render distances without the single-threaded stutter of vanilla Minecraft.
🎙️ Immersive Socials & Audio

Exploration is better with friends.

    Simple Voice Chat: Proximity voice support for the ultimate multiplayer experience.

    Sound Physics Remastered: Realistic echo and muffling that reacts to the terrain—hear the difference in deep caves or open valleys.

✨ Visuals & Shaders

We've bundled Iris Shaders with a selection of optimized presets. Whether you're using Distant Horizons to see the world or just want better lighting, performance remains the priority.
📜 Attribution & Credits

In compliance with mod licensing and moderation requirements, the following assets are included with credit to their original creators:

    Mod Menu Helper: Included via [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).

    Base Performance Engine: This pack is a fork of and stands on the shoulders of the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized). project by Robinson.

    World Generation: Terrain scales provided by Tectonic.

Key Features At A Glance:

    ✅ Core: Fabulously Optimized (Sodium, Lithium, etc.)

    ✅ Terrain: Tectonic + Lithostitched

    ✅ Visibility: Distant Horizons (LOD Rendering)

    ✅ Social: Simple Voice Chat + Emotecraft

    ✅ Audio: Sound Physics Remastered
